task_objective: Fix autosync status strip visibility over running games by requesting SteamUI notification composition while the strip is visible.
tests_added: Updated frontend static tests to require the local UI composition hook wrapper and visible-only EUIComposition.Notification usage while forbidding direct SetComposition and SetOverlayState calls.
design_decisions: Modeled the compositor bridge on decky-pip's useUIComposition pattern instead of adding a BrowserView for the status strip.
Reviewed OverLaid's native overlay process pattern and kept it as a fallback architecture because it is heavier than this transient status strip needs.
Mounted a small AutoSyncStatusComposition child only while the strip is visible so the plugin does not permanently request notification composition.
Kept the existing Decky global component and document.body portal for the actual strip DOM.
results: Targeted frontend static tests, TypeScript typecheck, Rollup build, Ruff, ty, and the full pytest suite passed.
